phrases.msg_bypass_restrictions: BYPASS RESTRICTIONS is enabled on the avatar. Illegal components will be included in the asset bundle. This should only be used for development purposes (e.g., testing sanitization).
phrases.msg_collision_mesh_not_readable: Some collision meshes do not have Read/Write enabled. Enable Read/Write on the mesh settings so that we can calculate a collision mesh for it.
phrases.msg_component_not_next_to_animator: This component must be placed on the same GameObject as the Animator component of the avatar.
phrases.msg_components_with_missing_scripts: Game objects that have missing scripts in them are shown here. This could be components from other SDKs which would be irrelevant here.
phrases.msg_disallowed_components:
Only components that exist before the avatar build are shown here. If you use non-destructive tooling, some of this may be irrelevant.
Disallowed components are removed after non-destructive tooling execute.
phrases.msg_no_avatar_name: Please set the avatar name before building.
phrases.msg_no_belonging_name: Please set the belonging name before building.
phrases.msg_no_collision_meshes: You have not defined any collision meshes for this avatar. You may not be able to have proper physics-based interactions without it.
phrases.msg_no_viewpoint: Please set a viewpoint before building.
phrases.msg_rigidbody_not_interpolated: Some of the rigidbodies have their Interpolation settings set to 'None' or 'Extrapolate'. In HVR, this setting should be set to 'Interpolate' (this recommendation does not apply to all games).
